item.scoring_description: D.Thompson-Robinson scrambles right end for 12 yards. TOUCHDOWN.

item.description: THREE-POINT CONVERSION ATTEMPT.
D.Thompson-Robinson steps back to pass.
Catch made by J.Thomas for yards.
THREE-POINT ATTEMPT SUCCEEDS.
PENALTY on DC-A.Hearn, Defensive Holding, 5 yards, declined.
THREE-POINT CONVERSION ATTEMPT. D.Thompson-Robinson steps back to pass. Catch made by J.Thomas for yards. THREE-POINT ATTEMPT SUCCEEDS. PENALTY on DC-A.Hearn, Defensive Holding, 5 yards, declined.
